title: antiaris toxicaria var. macrophylla
intro: Antiaris toxicaria var. macrophylla, also known as the broad-leaved ant tree, is a variant of the Antiaris toxicaria tree, a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Antiaris toxicaria var. macrophylla are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are also used in the form of ointments and creams to treat skin conditions and wounds.
